annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest set annually by the New Jersey Judiciary under Court Rule R. 4:42-11: a base rate tied to the State Cash Management Fund’s prior-year return — for 2026, 4.5% on judgments up to $20,000, and 6.5% (base + 2%) on judgments over $20,000. Simple interest. Verify the current year’s Notice to the Bar at njcourts.gov; not legal advice.
